overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic vehicle through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The drive begins at a sunlit intersection, passes through shaded underpasses and open commercial districts, and ends in a distinctive red-walled corridor. The footage features high-quality ray-traced graphics with vibrant neon signage and detailed vehicle interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with crosswalk and glass towers

events.description: blue sports car crosses the intersection from left to right in front of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then accelerating through the crosswalk, following the traffic flow

tall reflective skyscraper with geometric glass facade

highway overpass structure creating shaded area ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit futuristic intersection with a glass tower on the left and neon signs on the right. A blue sports car crosses in front of the vehicle, which then proceeds through the crosswalk toward a shaded overpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded urban street beneath concrete overpass

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: cruising through the shaded section of the street under the overpass

entered.detail: ground floor commercial establishments with dark facades and signage
shadowed building facades lining the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath a concrete overpass that blocks the sky, creating a low-light environment. Street-level shops line the left side while the right side features neon signage. The segment ends as the vehicle emerges back into bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial district with holographic advertising

events.description: navigating right turn through city intersection
merging with moderate traffic flow on multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: accelerating through open streets and executing a right turn past commercial buildings with holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: elevated glass-enclosed walkway connecting commercial buildings
large holographic billboards displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a bright open commercial district with glass facades and holographic billboards. After navigating a right turn at an intersection, the vehicle merges with traffic while passing beneath a pedestrian overpass on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-walled industrial corridor with overhead piping

events.description: entering distinctive corridor with vibrant red walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: following traffic through the narrow red-walled corridor with high industrial walls on both sides

notable_agents.action: red vehicle driving ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: vibrant red metal structural wall lining the left side of the corridor
vibrant red metal structural wall lining the right side of the corridor
exposed piping and conduits running along the ceiling of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically into a narrow corridor with striking red walls on both sides and industrial piping overhead. The vehicle follows traffic through this enclosed red passageway, which contrasts sharply with the open commercial district behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic city that transforms from a bright, open urban intersection into a claustrophobic industrial corridor. It begins at a sunlit crossing flanked by a glass tower and neon signs, moving past a blue sports car and through a crosswalk toward a shaded overpass. As the vehicle passes beneath the concrete structure, the environment dips into low light among street-level shops before emerging once again into the brilliant glare of a commercial district filled with holographic billboards. The camera then navigates a right turn and merges with traffic under a pedestrian bridge, shifting the perspective toward a narrow passage. Finally, the scene transitions dramatically into an enclosed corridor defined by striking red walls and overhead industrial piping, contrasting sharply with the open city behind.
